description: Product Description Clear Gloss Varnish Spray Can 250ml by Paints Factory Directions Prepare surface by sanding and cleaning. Shake can well before use. Hold can upright 6-8 inches from surface and spray in smooth, even strokes. Allow to dry for 24 hours between coats. Apply 2-3 coats for desired finish. Always use in a well-ventilated area and follow safety instructions on can.
